step_rationale: Secondary bile acid conjugate reflecting altered bile acid metabolism; systemic metabolic marker of MI response.
mechanism: Bile acid-amino acid conjugate reflecting perturbed hepatic lipid metabolism and systemic response to myocardial injury.

references.title: Acute myocardial infarction induces sex-specific, time-dependent remodeling of the gut microbiome and intestinal immune compartment in retired breeder C57BL/6N mice.
